aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite HVAC Cowboys due to limited structured data and a lack of conversational content.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed service information.
Expand FAQ content to address common HVAC queries and optimize with FAQPage schema.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not optimized and is invisible to Google AI, severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: GBP is not set up or claimed.
Missing photos, posts, and Q&A to engage potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Focus on expanding citations to industry-specific directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content prevents AI from recognizing HVAC Cowboys as an authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Kansas City, MO.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to improve AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating detailed content on HVAC maintenance and repairs, supported by schema markup, to position HVAC Cowboys as the local expert.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, HVAC Cowboys is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The Google Business Profile is not set up, making the business invisible in local AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes structured data implementation, GBP optimization, and creating conversational content to boost AI visibility and drive more qualified leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to stay competitive and capture market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for HVAC Cowboys in Kansas City
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to improve your AI search visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI and boost your lead generation.
